one_liner: DFTX tagged Automatic Rally (AR) by Wyckoff engine today — RSI at 90.77 is the most extreme overbought in the watchlist, 3.33x volume Selling Climax — $700M dilutive offering at $34 creates supply overhang; Jones Trading raised target to $74 but timing is everything.

price_action.intraday_story: DFTX opened at $44.70, spiked to $45.75, sold off to $42.84, then recovered to close at $44.95 — a volatile intraday session with a net gain of only $0.25. The Wyckoff engine tagged this as an Automatic Rally (AR) — the bounce following the prior session's Selling Climax. In the accumulation framework, AR follows SC and sets the upper boundary of the trading range.

news_catalyst.headline: Jones Trading Maintains Buy on Definium Therapeutics, Raises Price Target to $74 — $700M Offering Priced at $34
news_catalyst.summary: Jones Trading is bullish with a $74 target (65% upside), citing the psychedelics biotech pipeline. But the $700M upsized public offering at $34 per share created massive dilution — 20.5M new shares at $34 vs current price of $44.95 means the offering buyers are already up 32% and have supply to sell. The AR tag today (wyckoff_events: ['AR']) is the formal Wyckoff confirmation that the offering-driven frenzy has peaked and the stock is entering a basing phase.

technical.summary: RSI at 90.77 is the single most extreme overbought reading in the entire watchlist — a reading this high historically produces mean-reversion down to RSI 60-65 before the next sustainable leg begins. The AR tag confirms we are in the early Wyckoff basing phase post-SC. The stock needs to pull back and establish a base between $34 (offering price) and $40 before the next entry.

wyckoff_narrative: The Wyckoff sequence on DFTX: the $700M offering at $34 was the Selling Climax (SC) — climactic volume, wide spread, close above midpoint. Today's session with the AR tag confirms the AR phase — the bounce from SC. The next expected event is a Secondary Test (ST) of the SC lows ($34-36 zone) on below-average volume. That ST, if it holds, would be the accumulation base entry point. Until the ST occurs and holds, don't add new positions.

key_strengths: Jones Trading Buy with $74 target — institutional coverage
Psychedelics pipeline with potential FDA approval path
key_concerns: $700M dilutive offering creates 20.5M shares of supply at $34 — 32% below current price
fundamentals.summary: Grade C pre-revenue biotech. The offering buyers at $34 are 32% in profit and can sell at any time — that's the primary overhang to manage.

risks: RSI 90.77 — mean reversion to RSI 60-65 implies a 15-25% pullback from current levels before the next entry
20.5M shares of offering buyers at $34 are 32% in profit — massive supply overhang at the $40-45 level
Wyckoff AR phase = basing, not buying; wait for Secondary Test of $34-36 on low volume
